scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: node --env-file=.env.local --input-type=module -e "import { spawn } from 'node:child_process'; const env = { ...process.env, CORE_API_BASE_URL: process.env.CORE_API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000', CORE_API_KEY: process.env.CORE_API_KEY || process.env.API_KEY }; const child = spawn('npm', ['--prefix', 'site.financial', 'run', 'dev'], { stdio: 'inherit', env }); child.on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 0));"
scripts.sdk:generate: npm run openapi:export && openapi --input sdk/openapi.json --output sdk/generated --client fetch --useUnionTypes
